_headingsGuide: Use Heading 2 for sections, Heading 3 for sub-sections. Never use Heading 1 — the page title already serves as the main heading.
_imagesGuide: Recommended width: 800–1200 px. Keep file size under 200 KB. Always add alt text when uploading.
_tablesGuide:
Don't upload images of tables. Instead, paste the table image into ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini with this prompt:

"Convert this table image into a plain HTML table. Only output the <table> element with <thead>, <tbody>, <th>, and <td> tags. Do not include any CSS, classes, or styling attributes."

Then switch to Markdown mode in the editor and paste the HTML.
_linksGuide: Select text, click the link button, and paste the URL. External links automatically open in a new tab.
_workflowGuide: Save as Draft to work privately. Set to 'In Review' when ready for feedback. Publish when finalised.
_youtubeGuide: Copy the 11-character code after 'v=' in the URL. Example: youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ → dQw4w9WgXcQ
